"cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-770", "name": "Allocation of Resources Without Limits or Throttling"}], "description": "### Impact

`@fastify/accepts-serializer` cached serializer-selection results keyed by the request `Accept` header without a size limit or eviction policy. A remote unauthenticated client could send many distinct but matching `Accept` header variants to make the cache grow unbounded. Under sustained load, this can exhaust the Node.js heap and crash the process.

### Patches

Update to `@fastify/accepts-serializer >= 6.0.4`. The cache is now bounded by an LRU with a default size of 100 entries, configurable via the new `cacheSize` plugin option.

### Workarounds

None. Upgrade is required.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00284, "percentile": 0.19965}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-qxhc-wx3p-2wmg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T17:13:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qxhc-wx3p-2wmg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-qxhc-wx3p-2wmg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-7768"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-04T20:16:21Z", "published_at": "2026-05-08T17:13:38Z", "references": ["https://github.com/fastify/fastify-accepts-serializer/security/advisories/GHSA-qxhc-wx3p-2wmg", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7768", "https://cna.openjsf.org/security-advisories.html", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qxhc-wx3p-2wmg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/fastify/fastify-accepts-serializer/security-advisories/GHSA-qxhc-wx3p-2wmg", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/fastify/fastify-accepts-serializer", "summary": "@fastify/accepts-serializer Vulnerable to Denial of Service via Unbounded Accept Header Cache Growth", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-08T17:13:38Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-qxhc-wx3p-2wmg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.0.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "@fastify/accepts-serializer"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 6.0.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: @fastify/accepts-serializer Vulnerable to Denial of Service via Unbounded Accept Header Cache Growth
